executives.name: Alexander Bradley
executives.background: Mr. Bradley has served as our Chief Financial Officer since July 2016. He joined First Solar in 2008 and has held various roles in finance and corporate development.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

executives.name: Judy Bruner
executives.background: Judy Bruner was Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of SanDisk Corporation from 2004 until its acquisition by Western Digital in 2016.

executives.name: Mark Brazeal
executives.background: Mr. Brazeal has served as Chief Legal and Corporate Affairs Officer since June 2021. He joined Broadcom as Chief Legal Officer in December 2016. Prior to that, he was Chief Legal Officer and Senior Vice President, IP Licensing at SanDisk Corporation.

tenure_dates.title: Chief Legal Officer and Senior Vice President, IP Licensing

executives.name: Sanjay Mehrotra
executives.background: Sanjay Mehrotra is President and Chief Executive Officer at Micron Technology. He joined Micron in 2017 after a long career at SanDisk Corporation, which he co-founded and where he served as President and CEO from 2011 to 2016.

executives.name: Siva Sivaram
executives.background: Dr. Sivaram has served as our Chief Executive Officer since February 2024 and as a member of our Board since September 2023. Prior to joining QuantumScape, he served as President of Western Digital Corp. from 2020 to 2023 and as Executive Vice President of Silicon Technology from 2016 to 2020. He previously held leadership roles at SanDisk and Matrix Semiconductor.

executives.name: Sumit Sadana
executives.background: Sumit Sadana is Executive Vice President and Chief Business Officer. He joined Micron in 2017 from SanDisk, where he was Executive Vice President and Chief Strategy Officer.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Chief Strategy Officer and General Manager, Enterprise Solutions

board_of_directors.name: Alexander Bradley
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Bradley has served as our Chief Financial Officer since July 2016. He joined First Solar in 2008 and has held various roles in finance and corporate development.

tenure_dates.title: Member of the Board of Directors

board_of_directors.name: Judy Bruner
board_of_directors.background: Judy Bruner was Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of SanDisk Corporation from 2004 until its acquisition by Western Digital in 2016.

board_of_directors.name: Sanjay Mehrotra
board_of_directors.background: Sanjay Mehrotra is President and Chief Executive Officer at Micron Technology. He joined Micron in 2017 after a long career at SanDisk Corporation, which he co-founded and where he served as President and CEO from 2011 to 2016.

board_of_directors.name: Steven Gomo
board_of_directors.background: Steven Gomo has served as a director since March 2011. He was Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of NetApp, Inc. from 2002 to 2011. He also serves on the boards of Micron Technology and Nutanix.
